name: PayPal

attribution.note: Endpoint + field map used as REFERENCE (facts / interface, no source code copied). `version` is the woob module's last functional (intel) commit date. No code copied; Habeas replays the user's own live PayPal session, it does not log in. This adapter is data, AGPL-3.0-or-later like Habeas.

notes: BETA / UNVERIFIED and the intel is OLD (woob's PayPal logic last changed 2019-11) — expect the endpoint to have moved. Testable by the maintainer (has a PayPal account); use record mode to see what the CURRENT PayPal SPA actually calls. Open items: (1) the current activity endpoint is probably /myaccount/activities/api/v1/transactions (not the 2019 /myaccount/activity/filter) — confirm and swap; (2) the transactions array path (data.activity.transactions in 2019) and its params/date window; (3) a PARSEABLE date field — woob read date.formattedDate+date.year which is NOT ISO, the response almost certainly has a timestamp to map instead; (4) net vs gross amount and isCredit → sign.
